items.message: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

items.body:
## ЁЯОп Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This bot-filed issue identifies documentation gaps in `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs` and `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares`: the README files for both packages are missing examples for the newly added `Snapshot` and `VersionId` properties on `BlobStorageResourceOptions` and `ShareFileStorageResourceOptions` respectively, introduced in PR #57368.

<details>
<summary>ЁЯУЛ Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs` (12.4.0-beta.1) and `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares`
**Affected API:** `BlobStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot`, `BlobStorageResourceOptions.VersionId`, `ShareFileStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot`
**Scenarios:**
- Copying or downloading a blob snapshot using `BlobStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot`
- Copying or downloading a specific blob version using `BlobStorageResourceOptions.VersionId`
- Copying or downloading a file share snapshot using `ShareFileStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot`

**Root ask:** Add README examples and sample test code for these new properties so users discover and understand the snapshot/version transfer capabilities.
</details>

<details>
<summary>ЁЯФО Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

The CHANGELOG for `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs` 12.4.0-beta.1 describes the new `Snapshot` and `VersionId` feature, but the README "Blob Copy" and "Download" sections do not reference these options. The same gap exists for `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares` regarding `Snapshot`.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Review PR #57368 (commit 44777ce) to confirm the final API shape of `BlobStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot`, `BlobStorageResourceOptions.VersionId`, and `ShareFileStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot`.
2. Add subsections under the **Blob Copy** section in `sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/README.md` with snippet placeholders (`#region Snippet:s2sCopyBlobSnapshot` / `#region Snippet:s2sCopyBlobVersion`).
3. Add the corresponding sample test file at `sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/tests/Samples/Sample_BlobSnapshotVersion.cs`.
4. Add a subsection under the **File Copy** section in `sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares/README.md` with snippet placeholder (`#region Snippet:s2sCopyFileSnapshot_Shares`).
5. Run `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 storage` and verify README diffs look correct.
</details>

<details>
<summary>ЁЯП╖я╕П Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Client` тАФ both packages (`Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs`, `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares`) are data-plane client libraries, not management or provisioning
- **Service:** `Storage` тАФ both packages live under `sdk/storage/` and belong to the Azure Storage service family
- **Confidence:** High тАФ the issue explicitly names both packages and their service directory; no ambiguity between categories or services
</details>

<details>
<summary>ЁЯСе Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %Storage` (line 493) тАФ the predicted "Storage" service label matches this entry; it is the only `%Storage` ServiceLabel entry in the file
- **AzureSdkOwners:** none listed
- **ServiceOwners:** `@amnguye`, `@jalauzon-msft`, `@jaschrep-msft`, `@nickliu-msft`, `@seanmcc-msft`
- **Routing action:** Added "Service Attention" and "needs-team-attention" labels; left unassigned (ServiceOwners path); `@mentioned` all ServiceOwners in routing comment
- **Scan notes:** Bottom-to-top scan encountered `# ServiceLabel: %Data Lake Storage Gen2` (line 683) first тАФ requires "Data Lake Storage Gen2" label which is not predicted, skipped. Continued to `# ServiceLabel: %Storage` (line 493) тАФ matched on "Storage" label тЬЕ
</details>
